description: Unpausing tasks fail with ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/Users/eclipxe/Projects/kb/.fusion/tasks/KB-503/task.json.tmp
summary: Fixed ENOENT error when unpausing tasks with missing directories. Added `mkdir(dir, { recursive: true })` to `atomicWriteTaskJson` in packages/core/src/store.ts to ensure the task directory exists before writing task.json. Tests for the missing directory scenario were already added in prior commits. Created changeset file for the patch release.

steps.name: Fix atomicWriteTaskJson to Ensure Directory Exists
Add Test for Missing Directory Scenario

log.outcome: The plan correctly identifies the fix location and approach. The `mkdir` import already exists in `store.ts` (line 2), so no import changes are needed. Adding `mkdir(dir, { recursive: true })` at the start of `atomicWriteTaskJson` (line 391) is the minimal, correct fix that will resolve the ENOENT error for all callers—not just `pauseTask`.
